description: Corps logo workflow — generates an emblem/logo for a DCI corps using SDXL
prompt_template: A professional heraldic emblem logo for a drum corps called '{corps_name}'. Colors: {primary_color} and {secondary_color}. {style_notes}. Vector-style graphic design, clean sharp lines, symmetrical composition, bold iconic silhouette, shield or crest motif, marching band insignia, no text, isolated on dark background
negative_prompt: text, words, letters, typography, watermark, low quality, blurry, photorealistic, 3d render, photograph, human face, anime, cartoon, pixelated, noise, artifacts, busy background, multiple objects
